description: Style Note Ramping up your formal wear wardrobe from time to time is always a good idea. Give it a boost with this grey short skirt from tonga. Pair it with a dark satin blouse and wear a light coloured scarf to give yourself a formal makeover. Black high heels and chic accessories will suffice to complete the look. Product Details Solid grey formal pencil skirt with a zipper on the left, has a broad waistband with stitched detailing and a slit at the back Material and Care 95% cotton and 5% spandex Hand wash cold Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 5'8" and waist 28") is wearing a size M
